lines.original: Kubuka mata dan kulihat dunia
lines.translation: I open my eyes and see the world

lines.original: T'lah kuterima anugerah cintanya
lines.translation: I have received the gift of his love

lines.original: Tak pernah aku menyesali yang kupunya
lines.translation: I never regret what I have

lines.original: Tapi kusadari ada lubang dalam hati
lines.translation: But I realized there was a hole in my heart

lines.original: Kucari sesuatu yang mampu mengisi lubang ini
lines.translation: I'm looking for something that can fill this hole

lines.original: Kumenanti jawaban apa yang dikatakan oleh hati
lines.translation: I wait for the answer to what my heart says

lines.original: Apakah itu kamu? Apakah itu dia?
lines.translation: Is that you? Is that him?

lines.original: Selama ini kucari tanpa henti
lines.translation: I've been searching non-stop all this time

lines.original: Apakah itu cinta? Apakah itu cita?
lines.translation: Is that love? Is that a dream?

lines.original: Yang mampu melengkapi lubang di dalam hati
lines.translation: Which is able to fill the hole in the heart

lines.original: Kumengira hanya dialah obatnya
lines.translation: I thought he was the only cure

lines.original: Tapi k sadari bukan itu yang kucari
lines.translation: But I realized that wasn't what I was looking for

lines.original: Ku teruskan perjalanan panjang yang begitu melelahkan
lines.translation: I continue the long, tiring journey

lines.original: Dan kuyakin kau tak ingin aku berhenti
lines.translation: And I'm sure you don't want me to stop

lines.original: Apakah itu kamu? Apakah itu dia?
lines.translation: Is that you? Is that him?

lines.original: Selama ini kucari tanpa henti
lines.translation: I've been searching non-stop all this time

lines.original: Apakah itu cinta? Apakah itu cita?
lines.translation: Is that love? Is that a dream?

lines.original: Yang mampu melengkapi lubang di dalam hati
lines.translation: Which is able to fill the hole in the heart

lines.original: Oh
lines.translation: Oh

lines.original: Oh-oh-oh
lines.translation: Oh-oh-oh

lines.original: Oh
lines.translation: Oh

lines.original: Ye-ye-yeah
lines.translation: Ye-ye-yeah

lines.original: Apakah itu kamu? Apakah itu dia?
lines.translation: Is that you? Is that him?

lines.original: Selama ini kucari tanpa henti
lines.translation: I've been searching non-stop all this time

lines.original: Apakah itu cinta? Apakah itu cita?
lines.translation: Is that love? Is that a dream?

lines.original: Yang 'kan mengisi lubang di dalam hati
lines.translation: Which will fill the hole in my heart

lines.original: Oh
lines.translation: Oh
